title: Corporate VPN Tunnel Outage Blocking Remote Access
symptoms: VPN connection attempts timing out for new users
VPN gateway session table at 10,000/10,000 capacity
GlobalProtect client showing connection timeout errors
VPN gateway CPU at 45% indicating capacity not compute-bound
root_cause: VPN session table exhaustion due to orphaned sessions from improper disconnects accumulating over time combined with workforce growth exceeding planned capacity
resolution: Cleared 3,200 orphaned VPN sessions, increased session table limit to 15,000, implemented aggressive session timeout for idle connections, and added a secondary VPN gateway for overflow
preventive_actions: Implement automated orphaned session cleanup every 4 hours
Increase VPN capacity planning reviews to quarterly
Deploy secondary VPN gateway for load distribution and redundancy
Add VPN session utilization monitoring with alerts at 70% and 90%
Implement VPN session analytics for capacity forecasting

timeline.event: VPN gateway stops accepting new connections
First reports from EMEA employees unable to connect
IT helpdesk overwhelmed with VPN connection failure tickets
Maria Garcia investigates, identifies session table at capacity
Orphaned sessions cleared, session limit increased
New connections succeeding, backlog of users connecting
All remote employees connected, incident resolved

embedding_summary: Corporate VPN gateway session table exhaustion at 10,000 maximum sessions due to orphaned sessions and workforce growth. 2,200 EMEA remote employees unable to connect for 45 minutes. Resolved by clearing orphaned sessions, increasing limits, and deploying secondary gateway.
